summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean code, mentoring junior developers, and driving technical innovation. Expert in TypeScript, React, and Node.js with a track record of delivering high-impact products.

workHistory.title: Senior Software Engineer
workHistory.description: Lead development of microservices architecture serving 2M+ daily users. Architected real-time notification system reducing latency by 40%. Mentored team of 5 junior engineers.
highlights: Reduced API response time from 800ms to 120ms through optimization
Led migration from monolith to microservices architecture
Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%
Introduced comprehensive testing strategy achieving 85% code coverage
